---
title: "Draft"
# author: "Type Your Name Here"
# date: today
format: 
    pdf:        
        pdf-engine: lualatex
        template-partials:
            - ../../doc-class.tex
        include-in-header:
            - ../../math.tex
            - ../../pdfheader.tex
        mainfont: Libertinus Serif
        sansfont: Libertinus Sans
        monofont: Latin Modern Mono
        monofontoptions:
            - Scale=0.95
        mathfont: Libertinus Math
        highlight-style: arrow
params:
    show_solution: false
filters:
    - ../../solution-filter.lua
crossref:
    chapters: false
---



# Weekly Problem Sets

Each week includes **10 theoretical problems** and **10 coding problems** based on **real-world datasets**.

Datasets are chosen from:

- UCI Machine Learning Repository
- OpenML
- R datasets (ISLR, MASS, etc.)








## Instructions

- Show all mathematical derivations clearly.
- For simulation questions, set a random seed and report your findings with brief interpretations.
- For coding problems, include both code and short written conclusions.
- Unless otherwise stated, use **R**.
- You may use built-in R functions, but if a problem asks for a manual implementation, do not rely entirely on a black-box function.

---






## General Instructions

- Show all derivations clearly.
- For simulation questions, set a random seed and summarize your findings in words.
- For coding problems, include both code and interpretation.
- When a problem asks for a **manual implementation**, do not use only a black-box function.
- Unless otherwise stated, use **R**.
